wddegp_utils
============

.. py:module:: wddegp_utils


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   wddegp_utils.differences_by_dim_func
   wddegp_utils.rbf_kernel
   wddegp_utils.determine_weights


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: differences_by_dim_func(X1, X2, rays, n_order, index=-1, index_list=[])

   
   Compute directional differences between input arrays X1 and X2 along specified rays.

   :param X1: Array of shape (n_samples1, n_features) representing the first set of input points.
   :type X1: ndarray
   :param X2: Array of shape (n_samples2, n_features) representing the second set of input points.
   :type X2: ndarray
   :param rays: Array of shape (n_features, n_rays) representing direction vectors.
   :type rays: ndarray
   :param n_order: Maximum derivative order for hypercomplex expansion.
   :type n_order: int
   :param index: Index of the current submodel (used to select directional rays specific to this submodel).
   :type index: int, default=-1
   :param index_list: List of indices corresponding to the training points included in the current submodel.
   :type index_list: list, default=[]

   :returns: **differences_by_dim** -- List containing the directional differences for each feature dimension.
   :rtype: list of ndarray















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!

.. py:function:: rbf_kernel(differences, length_scales, n_order, n_bases, kernel_func, der_indices, powers, index=-1, index_list=[])

   
   Construct the kernel matrix for the weighted directional derivative-enhanced GP.

   :param differences: Precomputed pairwise differences by dimension.
   :type differences: list of ndarray
   :param length_scales: Array of length scales (hyperparameters).
   :type length_scales: ndarray
   :param n_order: Maximum derivative order.
   :type n_order: int
   :param n_bases: Number of OTI bases.
   :type n_bases: int
   :param kernel_func: Kernel function evaluated over differences.
   :type kernel_func: callable
   :param der_indices: Indices indicating derivative orders.
   :type der_indices: list
   :param powers: Powers of each term based on OTI basis structure.
   :type powers: list
   :param index: Dummy argument for compatibility.
   :type index: int, default=-1
   :param index_list: List identifying index subsets for directional derivatives.
   :type index_list: list, default=[]

   :returns: **K** -- Fully assembled kernel matrix including derivatives.
   :rtype: ndarray















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!

.. py:function:: determine_weights(diffs_by_dim, diffs_test, length_scales, kernel_func)

   
   Solve for Kriging weights using a Weighted Coefficient Kriging model.

   This method solves an augmented linear system that enforces unbiasedness
   and ensures the interpolation is consistent with the weighted directional
   derivative-enhanced GP structure.

   :param diffs_by_dim: Differences between training points.
   :type diffs_by_dim: list of ndarray
   :param diffs_test: Differences between training points and test point.
   :type diffs_test: list of ndarray
   :param length_scales: Kernel length scales.
   :type length_scales: ndarray
   :param kernel_func: Kernel function evaluated over pairwise differences.
   :type kernel_func: callable

   :returns: **w** -- Optimal weights vector for Weighted Coefficient Kriging interpolation.
   :rtype: ndarray















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!
